summary: Iteration 28 - AI Sentiment Analysis Bug Fixes VERIFIED. All 20 backend tests passed. 11 frontend tests passed. CRITICAL FIXES CONFIRMED: 1) AI model uses GPT-4o (not 'openai/gpt-4.1-mini'), 2) No sentiment-signal mismatches (BULLISH+BUY_PUT or BEARISH+BUY_CALL blocked), 3) India-specific context working (crude oil fall = BULLISH), 4) Signal mismatch validation at signal_generator.js lines 37-47 blocks inconsistent trades. Version v4.3.0 confirmed.
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL FIX 1 VERIFIED: sentiment.js line 126 uses model 'gpt-4o' (not 'openai/gpt-4.1-mini') - AI analysis working correctly
CRITICAL FIX 2 VERIFIED: ai_engine.js line 447 trade review also uses 'gpt-4o'
CRITICAL FIX 3 VERIFIED: India-specific market context added to AI prompt (lines 358-401) - crude oil fall correctly identified as BULLISH for India
CRITICAL FIX 4 VERIFIED: signal_generator.js lines 37-47 implements sentiment-signal mismatch validation - blocks BULLISH+BUY_PUT and BEARISH+BUY_CALL combinations
CRITICAL FIX 5 VERIFIED: computeFinalScore() uses dynamic weights (aiConfidence: 0.55 when data sparse, 0.35 when enough data) - trusts AI more during startup
Emergency stop works correctly - activates/deactivates and persists in settings
Auto-entry OFF correctly blocks trade execution (verified from iteration 27)
Today's P&L shows non-zero value (₹35 observed in UI)
All signals have consistent sentiment-signal mapping (BEARISH→PUT, BULLISH→CALL)
seed_data_creation: 4 open paper trades exist for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI sentiment analysis bug fixes verified. Model uses GPT-4o (not keyword fallback). Signal mismatch validation at signal_generator.js blocks inconsistent trades. India-specific context (crude oil fall = BULLISH) working. Auto-entry OFF still blocks trades. Emergency stop works. Version v4.3.0 confirmed.
